OWNRSHP_CD 

LABEL: Provider Ownership Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A code denoting the ownership interest and/or managing control information; most recent in the 
calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: OWNRSHP_CD 

LONG NAME: OWNRSHP_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF

VALUES: 01: Voluntary — Non-Profit —
